reason: Successfully verified browser use feature - agent opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and reported back correctly.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Gamut interface with sidebar containing agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260622-230616-yokm" agent in the sidebar — Agent page loaded, showing chat interface with message input box
Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was sent successfully and agent began processing
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed processing within 17 seconds, executing multiple tool calls (ToolSearch, Open Browser, Browser Get State, Close Browser)

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" and took screenshot — Response confirmed: "The page title is 'Example Domain'." Final summary stated: "Done — the page at https://example.com has the title 'Example Domain'. Browser closed."
